advisories.title: Severe stuttering on Windows 11 24H2
advisories.description: NVIDIA 551.xx drivers cause frame pacing issues and micro-stuttering on Windows 11 24H2 due to a graphics kernel interaction bug.

advisories.title: FPS drops after Windows 11 25H2 October 2025 update
advisories.description: NVIDIA confirmed gaming performance regression with KB5066835. Fixed in driver 581.94+.

advisories.title: Anti-Lag+ causes crashes in several games
advisories.description: Adrenalin 24.12.1 Anti-Lag+ implementation causes crashes in CS2, Fortnite, and Apex Legends.
advisories.recommendation: Update to 25.1.1 or newer, or disable Anti-Lag+ for affected games.

advisories.title: Realtek audio driver causes high DPC latency
advisories.description: Older Realtek HD Audio drivers are a common source of DPC latency spikes, causing audio glitches and micro-stutters during gaming.
advisories.recommendation: Update to the latest Realtek driver from your motherboard manufacturer's website.

advisories.title: Intel Arc DX12 stability issues
advisories.description: Intel Arc drivers before 32.0.101.6083 have known DX12 stability issues causing crashes and rendering artifacts in modern games.
advisories.recommendation: Update to Intel Arc driver 32.0.101.6083 or newer.

advisories.title: Shader cache corruption causes stuttering
advisories.description: NVIDIA 545-546.xx drivers have a shader cache corruption bug that causes progressive stuttering over time. Clearing the shader cache temporarily fixes it but the issue recurs.
